purpose: Task keywords -> tool sequences. Used by scripts/misc/ai_tool.py plan so agents remember which installed tools to use.

rules.when: New web/website CTF target or sparse route map.
rules.method: Probe status/tech with httpx; crawl with katana; fuzz routes with ffuf/gobuster/feroxbuster; save raw outputs under exports/ctf-website/<case>.
rules.evidence: HTTP status/title/headers, discovered URLs, wordlist, response filters.

rules.when: Forms, parameters, JSON APIs, template rendering, search endpoints, or error-based hints.
rules.method: Confirm one narrow input-to-effect path manually, then use sqlmap/tplmap for systematic enumeration; use jwt_tool for token trust boundary checks.
rules.evidence: Request, payload, response delta, DBMS/template engine fingerprint, extracted proof.

rules.method: Write cases/<case>/fingerprints.json; run fingerprint_cve_pipeline; inspect graph/chain output; use searchsploit for local exploit references.
rules.evidence: Fingerprint source, CVE report, EPSS/KEV/CWE/product edges, chain validation steps.

rules.when: Authenticated browser state, complex session mutation, or manual Repeater/Intruder workflow is needed.
rules.method: Do not auto-launch in checks. Start Burp only on explicit user request; export decisive requests to cases/<case>/evidence.
rules.evidence: Raw HTTP request/response, cookies, session diff, replay result.

rules.when: APK/XAPK/JAR/AAR static analysis or endpoint/secret extraction.
rules.method: Use apktool for resources/manifest/smali; use jadx only when registry marks it callable; write outputs to projects/android/<case> and exports/android/<case>.
rules.evidence: Manifest entries, permissions, strings, endpoints, decompiled class paths.

rules.when: Patch/repack APK or deploy Frida server to emulator/device.
rules.method: Patch copy only; rebuild with apktool; sign with uber-apk-signer; use install_frida_server.ps1 for target-side frida-server.
rules.evidence: Original hash, patch diff, signed APK path, frida version/process list.

rules.when: Windows native binary triage or patch/crackme analysis.
rules.method: Automatic checks do file probes only. For analysis use reverse_lab_tools/sample_full_workup first; GUI tools are explicit/manual follow-up.
rules.evidence: Hashes, imports, strings, sections, entrypoint, behavior logs, patch bytes.

rules.when: GitHub release 下载不稳且本地 jadx zip/jar 损坏
rules.method: 若 jadx 再损坏，优先从 SourceForge mirror 下载 v1.5.5 zip，验证 zip/jar 后解压到 tools/android/jadx，并确认 ai_toolcheck android PASS。
rules.evidence: Tool version output and analysis artifacts produced in the current workspace.

rules.when: JWT token found in Authorization header, cookie, or URL param.

ctf.jwt_tool.usage:
jwt_tool TOKEN -C -w jwt-common.txt  (爆破密钥)
jwt_tool TOKEN -X at                      (alg:none)
jwt_tool TOKEN -X k                       (KID注入)

rules.method: jwt_tool 探测算法、爆破弱密钥、alg:none、KID注入。先跑 -t (scan) 看概览。

rules.when: Forms, URL params, JSON APIs, headers that interact with SQL backend.

ctf.sqlmap.usage:
sqlmap -r request.txt --batch  (基础)
sqlmap -r request.txt --tamper=space2comment,charencode --level=5 --risk=3  (WAF绕过)
sqlmap 数据可复用于 ffuf/手动构造

rules.method: 先手工确认注入点，再上 sqlmap。关注 tamper/ 目录绕过 WAF。sqlmap 的 txt 字典可复用于其他 fuzz 工具。
rules.evidence: 注入点 URL, parameter, DBMS, extracted data, flag

rules.when: 页面回显用户输入，或 500 错误暴露模板引擎信息。

ctf.tplmap.usage:
tplmap.py -u 'URL?param=*' --engine jinja2
不指定引擎时自动检测

rules.method: 先用手工 {{7*7}} 确认注入点，再用 tplmap 自动探测引擎类型和 RCE。
rules.evidence: SSTI payload, engine fingerprint, RCE proof, flag

rules.when: 发现产品名称/版本号，需要查已公开 exploit。
rules.method: searchsploit 查本地 exploitdb；配合 fingerprint_cve_pipeline.py 做CVE图谱。
rules.evidence: CVE-IDs, EDB-IDs, exploit path, exploit result

rules.when: 需要暴力枚举目录/文件/路由/参数。

ctf.sqlmap_reuse.note: sqlmap 内置字典可复用为 ffuf 输入

rules.method: dirsearch 做首轮目录扫描；ffuf 做精细化 fuzz（参数/header/cookie）。复用 sqlmap 的 smalldict.txt 和 common-files.txt 作为 ffuf 字典。
rules.evidence: discovered paths, status codes, response sizes

rules.when: 有存活 URL 列表，需要批量扫 CVE/config/exposure。

ctf.nuclei.templates_online: nuclei -ut (更新模板库，本地缓存 6700+ 模板)
ctf.nuclei.usage:
nuclei -u URL -t cves/             (CVE 扫描)
nuclei -u URL -t exposures/configs/  (配置泄露)
nuclei -u URL -t vulnerabilities/    (漏洞扫描)
nuclei -l urls.txt -t ~/nuclei-templates/ (批量)

rules.method: 先 httpx 做存活探测，再 nuclei 批量扫模板。优先 cves/ 和 exposures/ 分类。
rules.evidence: template name, matched URL, severity, extracted info

rules.when: 支付/订单/回调/签名/订阅/卡密任何支付类攻击面。

ctf.ffuf.note: 用 sqlmap smalldict.txt + dirsearch dicc.txt 做支付路由/参数 fuzz

ctf.jwt_tool.note: JWT 弱密钥字典可复用于签名爆破

rules.method: 先查 TOOL-PAYLOAD-MAP.md 看哪些工具 payload 可用。金额/状态/签名/方法字段用 ffuf + sqlmap字典做参数fuzz。签名爆破复用 jwt_tool 弱密钥字典。
rules.evidence: bypass payload, response diff, order state change, flag

rules.when: 任何签名验证场景（支付回调/API签名/JWT/文件校验/Cookie签名/Webhook）。

ctf.jwt_tool.usage: jwt_tool 的字典可复用于非 JWT 场景的 HMAC 密钥爆破

ctf.sqlmap.tamper_scripts: tools\ctf-website\sqlmap\tamper\  (编码/混淆可参考用于签名变体)

ctf.ffuf.note: 用 sqlmap smalldict 做 sign_type/sign_method/algorithm 字段 fuzz

rules.method: 先跑 signature_surface_probe.py 识别签名类型。JWT类用 jwt_tool；支付回调类复用 jwt_tool字典+sqlmap字典做参数fuzz。算法降级/编码攻击用 ffuf 批量测。
rules.evidence: signature type, bypass method, forged payload, verification result, flag

rules.when: 需要端口扫描、服务识别、NSE脚本探测。

ctf.nmap.usage:
nmap -sV -sC TARGET              (默认脚本)
nmap --script=http-* TARGET        (Web类)
nmap --script=vuln TARGET          (漏洞类)

rules.method: nmap -sV -sC 首轮；按需加 --script 分类。结果喂给 httpx + nuclei。
rules.evidence: open ports, services, versions, NSE output

rules.when: 目标确认使用 PHP（X-Powered-By / PHPSESSID / .php 路由 / Laravel/TP 特征）。

ctf.jwt_tool.note: 弱密钥字典可用于 PHP HMAC 签名爆破

ctf.ffuf.note: 用 smalldict 做 Laravel/TP 路由 fuzz；PHP 特征路径 fuzz

rules.method: PHP type juggling 用手工 Python（见 payment-php.md）；SQLi 用 sqlmap；路由 fuzz 用 ffuf。
rules.evidence: PHP version, framework fingerprint, type juggling bypass, flag
